author: Adam Eckert
teaser: A new court document filed on June 28 reportedly accused Gill of manipulating GameStop's stock price via social media. The lawsuit alleges that Gill loaded up on call options before making posts that sparked renewed interest in GameStop stock. The news comes as the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission had been looking into recent options trading activity in GameStop.
teaserText: A new court document filed on June 28 reportedly accused Gill of manipulating GameStop's stock price via social media. The lawsuit alleges that Gill loaded up on call options before making posts that sparked renewed interest in GameStop stock. The news comes as the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission had been looking into recent options trading activity in GameStop.
title: What's Going On With GameStop Stock Monday?

teaser: ZEEKR surged after reporting June 2024 deliveries of 20,106 vehicles, an 89% year-over-year increase. Year-to-date deliveries reached 87,870, a 106% growth. ZEEKR's flagship model, the ZEEKR 001, surpassed 200,000 deliveries.
teaserText: ZEEKR surged after reporting June 2024 deliveries of 20,106 vehicles, an 89% year-over-year increase. Year-to-date deliveries reached 87,870, a 106% growth. ZEEKR's flagship model, the ZEEKR 001, surpassed 200,000 deliveries.
title: Why Is Chinese EV Maker ZEEKR Stock Surging Today?
